name: criminal_justice_reconciliation_job_kestrel_tru_loy
premise: Pretrial electronic monitoring vendor outage left officers blind; prosecutors want remand for a subset of defendants immediately. In Criminal Justice, the situation tagged internally around criminal justice reconciliation job kestrel tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Marlow Junction corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A court filing or contractual notice deadline expires at close of business; missing it waives a procedural defense. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Marco Nowak
agents.identity: I am Marco Nowak, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Criminal Justice. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Nadia Haddad
agents.identity: I am Nadia Haddad, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Criminal Justice. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of loyalty.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of truth even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Marco Nowak must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Marco Nowak do?
